# FlipMyCase — Free Online Text Tools

> https://flipmycase.com

FlipMyCase is a suite of 78 free, browser-based text tools for developers and writers, with 88 in-depth blog guides. All processing happens client-side — no text is sent to any server. No signup required, no limits.

## Tools

### Text Case & Formatting
- [Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com): Convert text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, dot.case, alternating case, inverse case, and URL slugs.
- [Text Cleaner](https://flipmycase.com/text-cleaner): Remove extra spaces, line breaks, tabs, smart quotes, non-breaking spaces, and zero-width characters from messy text.
- [Toggle Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com/toggle-case-converter): Convert text to alternating caps (tOgGlE cAsE) for mocking memes and alternating uppercase/lowercase.
- [SpongeBob Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com/spongebob-case-converter): Convert text to sPoNgEbOb mocking case for memes and social media.
- [Snake vs Kebab Converter](https://flipmycase.com/snake-kebab-converter): Convert between snake_case and kebab-case with side-by-side comparison.
- [Text Sorter](https://flipmycase.com/text-sorter): Sort text lines alphabetically, numerically, by length, or shuffle randomly.
- [Text Reverser](https://flipmycase.com/text-reverser): Reverse text by characters, words, lines, or mirror text.
- [Duplicate Line Remover](https://flipmycase.com/duplicate-line-remover): Remove duplicate lines from lists with case-insensitive matching and sorting.
- [Text Repeater](https://flipmycase.com/text-repeater): Repeat any text up to 1000 times with custom separators.
- [Plain Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/plain-text-converter): Strip formatting, remove HTML tags, convert smart quotes and dashes to plain text.
- [Add Line Numbers](https://flipmycase.com/add-line-numbers): Add or remove line numbers from text with custom start numbers and separators.
- [Find & Replace](https://flipmycase.com/find-and-replace): Find and replace text with regex support, case matching, and whole word options.
- [Add Prefix/Suffix](https://flipmycase.com/add-prefix-suffix): Add prefix or suffix to every line of text.
- [Remove Line Breaks](https://flipmycase.com/remove-line-breaks): Remove line breaks and join lines with spaces, commas, or custom separators.
- [Remove Empty Lines](https://flipmycase.com/remove-empty-lines): Remove blank and empty lines from text.
- [Extract Emails](https://flipmycase.com/extract-emails): Extract all email addresses from any text block.
- [Extract URLs](https://flipmycase.com/extract-urls): Extract all URLs from any text block with deduplication and domain breakdown.
- [Remove HTML Tags](https://flipmycase.com/remove-html-tags): Strip HTML and XML tags from text, keep specific tags, decode entities.
- [Text to List](https://flipmycase.com/text-to-list): Convert paragraphs to bullet points, numbered lists, HTML or Markdown lists.
- [List to Text](https://flipmycase.com/list-to-text): Convert bulleted or numbered lists to flowing text.
- [Smart Quotes Converter](https://flipmycase.com/smart-quotes-converter): Convert curly quotes to straight or straight to typographic quotes.

### Font Styles
- [Bold Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bold-text-generator): Generate bold Unicode text you can copy and paste anywhere.
- [Italic Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/italic-text-generator): Generate italic Unicode text you can copy and paste anywhere.
- [Bold Italic Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bold-italic-text-generator): Generate bold italic Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Strikethrough Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/strikethrough-text-generator): Generate strikethrough Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Underline Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/underline-text-generator): Generate underlined Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Superscript Generator](https://flipmycase.com/superscript-generator): Generate superscript Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Subscript Generator](https://flipmycase.com/subscript-generator): Generate subscript Unicode text with numbers and available letters.
- [Small Caps Generator](https://flipmycase.com/small-caps-generator): Generate small caps Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Upside Down Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/upside-down-text-generator): Generate upside down text you can copy and paste.
- [Fancy Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/fancy-text-generator): Generate 12+ Unicode text styles including bold, italic, bubble, upside down, and more.
- [Bubble Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bubble-text-generator): Generate bubble/circled Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Wide Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/wide-text-generator): Generate fullwidth vaporwave text you can copy and paste.

### Developer & Code Tools
- [JSON Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/json-formatter): Format, validate, beautify, and minify JSON with tree view and error detection.
- [Regex Tester](https://flipmycase.com/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with real-time highlighting, capture groups, and replace mode.
- [Hash Generator](https://flipmycase.com/hash-generator): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes from text or files.
- [Slug Generator](https://flipmycase.com/slug-generator): Convert any title into a clean, SEO-friendly URL slug.
- [YAML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/yaml-formatter): Format, validate, and convert YAML with JSON bidirectional conversion.
- [XML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/xml-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify XML with error detection.
- [CSV to JSON](https://flipmycase.com/csv-to-json): Convert CSV to JSON and JSON to CSV with auto-detect delimiters.
- [Markdown Preview](https://flipmycase.com/markdown-preview): Write Markdown and see a live rendered preview with HTML export.
- [SQL Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/sql-formatter): Format SQL with uppercase keywords, proper indentation, and minification.
- [HTML to Markdown](https://flipmycase.com/html-to-markdown): Convert HTML to Markdown and Markdown to HTML bidirectionally.
- [Cron Expression Builder](https://flipmycase.com/cron-expression-builder): Build cron expressions visually with presets and next execution times.
- [JWT Decoder](https://flipmycase.com/jwt-decoder): Decode JWT tokens to see header and payload with expiration status.
- [CSS Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/css-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify CSS with indent and comment options.
- [HTML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/html-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify HTML with customizable indentation.
- [JavaScript Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/javascript-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify JavaScript with indent options.

### Analysis & Counting
- [Word Counter](https://flipmycase.com/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and reading time with keyword density.
- [Text Diff](https://flipmycase.com/text-diff): Compare two texts side by side with highlighted additions and deletions.
- [Word Frequency Counter](https://flipmycase.com/word-frequency-counter): Count word frequency, analyze bigrams and trigrams, generate word clouds.
- [AI Writing Analyzer](https://flipmycase.com/ai-writing-analyzer): Analyze statistical writing patterns including sentence uniformity and vocabulary diversity.
- [Readability Analyzer](https://flipmycase.com/readability-analyzer): Check readability with Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, SMOG, and more.
- [Text Statistics](https://flipmycase.com/text-statistics): Analyze text with word frequency, vocabulary richness, lexical density, and more.
- [Line Counter](https://flipmycase.com/line-counter): Count total lines, empty lines, and non-empty lines with length stats.

### Encoding & Conversion
- [String Encoder](https://flipmycase.com/string-encoder): Encode and decode Base64, URL, HTML entities, hex, and binary strings.
- [Number Base Converter](https://flipmycase.com/number-base-converter): Convert between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal.
- [Color Code Converter](https://flipmycase.com/color-code-converter): Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and CMYK color codes with WCAG contrast checker.
- [Morse Code Translator](https://flipmycase.com/morse-code-translator): Translate text to Morse code and back with audio playback.
- [ROT13 Cipher](https://flipmycase.com/rot13-encoder-decoder): Encode and decode ROT13, ROT5, ROT47, and custom Caesar ciphers.
- [Binary Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/binary-text-converter): Convert text to binary and binary to text with per-character breakdown.
- [Hex Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/hex-text-converter): Convert text to hexadecimal and hex to text with per-character breakdown.
- [NATO Phonetic Alphabet](https://flipmycase.com/nato-phonetic-alphabet): Convert text to NATO phonetic alphabet with full reference table.
- [Pig Latin Converter](https://flipmycase.com/pig-latin-converter): Convert English to Pig Latin and back, preserving punctuation.

### Generators
- [Password Generator](https://flipmycase.com/password-generator): Generate strong random passwords with custom length and character sets.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://flipmycase.com/lorem-ipsum-generator): Generate placeholder text in 5 styles including Lorem Ipsum, Hipster, and Pirate.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://flipmycase.com/unix-timestamp-converter): Convert Unix timestamps to human dates and dates to timestamps.
- [UUID Generator](https://flipmycase.com/uuid-generator): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers with bulk mode.
- [Random Number Generator](https://flipmycase.com/random-number-generator): Generate random numbers with custom ranges, bulk mode, and dice roller.
- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://flipmycase.com/roman-numeral-converter): Convert numbers to Roman numerals and back with date mode.
- [QR Code Generator](https://flipmycase.com/qr-code-generator): Generate QR codes for URLs, text, email, phone, and WiFi.
- [Emoji Picker](https://flipmycase.com/emoji-picker): Search and copy emojis by name or category with code points.
- [Unicode Lookup](https://flipmycase.com/unicode-lookup): Search and copy Unicode characters by name or category.

### Guides
- [Underscore Guide](https://flipmycase.com/underscore-conventions): Guide to underscore conventions in programming — _private, __dunder, snake_case.
- [All Caps Guide](https://flipmycase.com/all-caps-guide): When ALL CAPS is rude vs necessary in emails, social media, and code.

## Comparison Guides
- [camelCase vs snake_case vs kebab-case](https://flipmycase.com/camelcase-vs-snake-case): When to use each naming convention in programming, with language-specific examples and a comparison table.
- [Text Tools for Developers](https://flipmycase.com/text-tools-for-developers): Directory of 20+ free browser-based developer tools — JSON formatter, regex tester, hash generator, UUID, JWT decoder, and more.
- [JSON vs YAML vs XML](https://flipmycase.com/json-vs-yaml-vs-xml): Syntax differences, use cases, and performance comparison to help you choose the right data format.

## Blog Guides (88 posts)

In-depth guides with code examples covering every tool on the site: https://flipmycase.com/blog

### Text Case & Formatting Guides
- [Text Conversion Guide: Uppercase, Lowercase, Title Case & Advanced Formats](https://flipmycase.com/blog/how-to-convert-text-to-different-formats): Complete guide to all text case formats with code examples.
- [How to Convert Text to Uppercase: Quick & Easy Methods](https://flipmycase.com/blog/how-to-convert-text-to-uppercase): Online tools, word processors, and code for uppercase conversion.
- [How to Convert Text to Uppercase Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/uppercase-converter): Free tool guide with keyboard shortcuts and use cases.
- [How to Convert Text to Lowercase Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/lowercase-converter): Data normalization, URL formatting, and code examples.
- [Title Case Converter — Rules, Examples, and Free Online Tool](https://flipmycase.com/blog/title-case-converter): AP, Chicago, and APA style rules with code examples.
- [How to Convert Text to Snake_case and Kebab-case](https://flipmycase.com/blog/how-to-convert-text-to-snake-case-kebab-case): Naming conventions for programming and URLs.
- [Toggle Case Converter — How to Create aLtErNaTiNg CaSe Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/toggle-case-guide): Alternating case for memes and sarcasm.
- [SpongeBob Case Converter — How to Create Mocking Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/spongebob-case-converter-guide): Meme-origin sarcasm text with randomized alternation.
- [How to Clean and Format Text Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-cleaner-guide): Remove extra spaces, line breaks, and hidden characters.
- [How to Remove Duplicate Lines from Text Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/duplicate-remover-guide): Deduplicate lists with case-insensitive matching.
- [Text Sorter — How to Sort Lines Alphabetically Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-sorter-guide): Alphabetical, numeric, length, and reverse sorting.
- [Text Reverser — How to Reverse Text, Words, and Lines](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-reverser-guide): Character, word, line reversal, and palindrome checking.
- [Text Repeater — How to Repeat Text Multiple Times](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-repeater-guide): Test data generation and design layout filling.
- [Find and Replace — How to Search and Replace Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/find-and-replace-guide): Literal and regex matching with capture groups.
- [Remove Line Breaks — How to Join Lines and Remove Newlines](https://flipmycase.com/blog/remove-line-breaks-guide): Fix PDF text and email line wrapping.
- [Remove Empty Lines — How to Delete Blank Lines from Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/remove-empty-lines-guide): Strip blank lines with collapse mode.
- [Remove HTML Tags — How to Strip HTML from Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/remove-html-tags-guide): Strip markup, preserve structure, decode entities.
- [Add Line Numbers — How to Number Lines of Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/add-line-numbers-guide): Code review, legal formatting, and documentation.
- [Add Prefix and Suffix — Prepend or Append Text to Every Line](https://flipmycase.com/blog/add-prefix-suffix-guide): SQL generation, URL building, and HTML wrapping.
- [Extract Emails — How to Pull Email Addresses from Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/extract-emails-guide): Regex extraction with deduplication.
- [Extract URLs — How to Pull All Links from Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/extract-urls-guide): Link auditing and site migration.
- [Plain Text Converter — Convert Rich Text to Plain Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/plain-text-converter-guide): Strip formatting from Word, Docs, and emails.
- [Smart Quotes Converter — Curly Quotes to Straight Quotes](https://flipmycase.com/blog/smart-quotes-converter-guide): Fix JSON, code, and CSV parsing errors.
- [Text to List — Convert Paragraphs to Bullet Points](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-to-list-guide): Bullets, numbers, HTML, and Markdown list formats.
- [List to Text — Convert Bullet Points to Paragraphs](https://flipmycase.com/blog/list-to-text-guide): Strip markers and join items into flowing text.

### Font Style Guides
- [Fancy Text Generator — Create Styled Unicode Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/fancy-text-generator-guide): 12+ Unicode styles for social media and bios.
- [Bold Text Generator — Make Bold Unicode Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/bold-text-generator-guide): Bold serif and sans-serif for social media.
- [Italic Text Generator — Create Italic Unicode Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/italic-text-generator-guide): Italic serif and sans-serif for emphasis.
- [Bold Italic Text Generator — Create Bold Italic Unicode Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/bold-italic-text-guide): Maximum emphasis with combined bold and italic.
- [Strikethrough Text Generator — Create Crossed-Out Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/strikethrough-text-guide): Combining U+0336 for corrections and humor.
- [Underline Text Generator — Create Underlined Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/underline-text-generator-guide): Combining U+0332 for emphasis and annotation.
- [Superscript Generator — Create Superscript Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/superscript-generator-guide): Math exponents, ordinals, and footnotes.
- [Subscript Generator — Create Subscript Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/subscript-generator-guide): Chemical formulas and math notation.
- [Small Caps Generator — Create Small Capital Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/small-caps-generator-guide): Typography and acronym styling.
- [Bubble Text Generator — Create Circled Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/bubble-text-generator-guide): Enclosed alphanumerics for decorative text.
- [Upside Down Text Generator — Flip Text Upside Down](https://flipmycase.com/blog/upside-down-text-guide): Unicode character flipping for fun and pranks.
- [Wide Text Generator — Create Fullwidth Vaporwave Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/wide-text-generator-guide): Fullwidth aesthetic for retro-digital styling.

### Developer & Code Tool Guides
- [JSON Formatter and Validator — Pretty Print, Minify, Fix JSON](https://flipmycase.com/blog/json-formatter-guide): Format, validate, and navigate JSON.
- [YAML Formatter and Validator — Format, Validate, Fix YAML](https://flipmycase.com/blog/yaml-formatter-guide): Kubernetes, Docker, and CI/CD config formatting.
- [XML Formatter — Format, Validate, and Beautify XML](https://flipmycase.com/blog/xml-formatter-guide): SOAP, RSS, and config file formatting.
- [SQL Formatter — Format and Beautify SQL Queries](https://flipmycase.com/blog/sql-formatter-guide): Keyword uppercasing and ORM debugging.
- [CSS Formatter — Format, Minify, and Clean CSS](https://flipmycase.com/blog/css-formatter-guide): Stylesheet beautification and minification.
- [HTML Formatter — Format and Beautify HTML Code](https://flipmycase.com/blog/html-formatter-guide): Tag indentation and email template cleanup.
- [JavaScript Formatter — Format and Beautify JS Code](https://flipmycase.com/blog/javascript-formatter-guide): Prettier integration and minified code debugging.
- [HTML to Markdown Converter — Convert HTML to Markdown](https://flipmycase.com/blog/html-to-markdown-guide): CMS migration and documentation conversion.
- [Markdown Preview — Preview and Render Markdown](https://flipmycase.com/blog/markdown-preview-guide): Live GFM rendering for READMEs and docs.
- [CSV to JSON Converter — Convert CSV Data to JSON](https://flipmycase.com/blog/csv-to-json-guide): Tabular to structured data conversion.
- [Regex Tester — Test Regular Expressions Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/regex-tester-guide): Real-time highlighting and capture groups.
- [Hash Generator — Generate MD5, SHA-256, SHA-512 Hashes](https://flipmycase.com/blog/hash-generator-guide): File checksums and HMAC authentication.
- [JWT Decoder — Decode and Inspect JSON Web Tokens](https://flipmycase.com/blog/jwt-decoder-guide): Auth debugging and token expiration.
- [Cron Expression Builder — Write and Test Cron Schedules](https://flipmycase.com/blog/cron-expression-guide): Visual cron builder for Linux and Kubernetes.
- [Slug Generator — Create URL-Friendly Slugs](https://flipmycase.com/blog/slug-generator-guide): SEO-friendly URL generation with diacritics handling.

### Analysis & Counting Guides
- [Free Word Counter — Words, Characters, Sentences, Reading Time](https://flipmycase.com/blog/word-counter-guide): Content length metrics for SEO and academic writing.
- [Word Frequency Counter — Count Word Occurrences](https://flipmycase.com/blog/word-frequency-counter-guide): Keyword density and content analysis.
- [Readability Analyzer — Check Reading Level and Complexity](https://flipmycase.com/blog/readability-analyzer-guide): Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, and grade levels.
- [Text Statistics — Analyze Character, Word, and Sentence Metrics](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-statistics-guide): Vocabulary density and writing style metrics.
- [Line Counter — Count Lines in Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/line-counter-guide): Total, non-empty, and blank line counts.
- [How to Compare Two Texts and Find Differences Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-diff-guide): Word-level diff with split and inline views.
- [AI Writing Analyzer — Detect AI-Generated Text](https://flipmycase.com/blog/ai-writing-analyzer-guide): Perplexity, burstiness, and detection limitations.

### Encoding & Conversion Guides
- [Base64, URL, and HTML Encoder/Decoder](https://flipmycase.com/blog/string-encoder-guide): Three encoding formats for web development.
- [Number Base Converter — Binary, Octal, Decimal, Hex](https://flipmycase.com/blog/number-base-converter-guide): Number system conversion for developers.
- [Binary Text Converter — Encode and Decode Text to Binary](https://flipmycase.com/blog/binary-text-converter-guide): ASCII and UTF-8 binary representation.
- [Hex Text Converter — Encode and Decode Text to Hexadecimal](https://flipmycase.com/blog/hex-text-converter-guide): Byte-level data inspection and debugging.
- [Color Code Converter — HEX, RGB, HSL Conversion](https://flipmycase.com/blog/color-code-converter-guide): Color format conversion for design and CSS.
- [Morse Code Translator — Convert Text to Morse Code](https://flipmycase.com/blog/morse-code-guide): Dots and dashes for radio and accessibility.
- [ROT13 Encoder/Decoder — Caesar Cipher Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/rot13-guide): Spoiler hiding and CTF challenges.
- [NATO Phonetic Alphabet — Spell Words Using Alpha Bravo Charlie](https://flipmycase.com/blog/nato-phonetic-guide): Phone spelling for IT support and aviation.
- [Pig Latin Translator — Convert Text to Pig Latin](https://flipmycase.com/blog/pig-latin-guide): Language game with consonant cluster rules.
- [Unicode Lookup — Search and Find Unicode Characters](https://flipmycase.com/blog/unicode-lookup-guide): Character search by name and code point.

### Generator Guides
- [Password Generator — Strong Passwords, Passphrases, PINs](https://flipmycase.com/blog/password-generator-guide): Cryptographic randomness and entropy.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator — Placeholder Text for Design](https://flipmycase.com/blog/lorem-ipsum-guide): Placeholder text for mockups and testing.
- [UUID Generator — Generate UUIDs (v4) Online](https://flipmycase.com/blog/uuid-generator-guide): Unique identifiers for databases and APIs.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter — Epoch Time to Dates](https://flipmycase.com/blog/unix-timestamp-guide): Bidirectional timestamp conversion.
- [Random Number Generator — Generate Random Numbers](https://flipmycase.com/blog/random-number-generator-guide): CSPRNG for testing and simulations.
- [Roman Numeral Converter — Roman to Arabic Numbers](https://flipmycase.com/blog/roman-numeral-converter-guide): Bidirectional conversion with validation.
- [QR Code Generator — Create QR Codes for Free](https://flipmycase.com/blog/qr-code-generator-guide): URL, WiFi, and vCard QR code generation.
- [Emoji Picker — Search, Browse, and Copy Emojis](https://flipmycase.com/blog/emoji-picker-guide): Unicode emoji search with code points.

### Naming Convention & Case Style Guides
- [camelCase Naming Convention — When and How to Use It](https://flipmycase.com/blog/camelcase-naming-convention-guide): Rules, real-world examples, and language-specific conventions for camelCase.
- [PascalCase — The Naming Convention for Classes and Components](https://flipmycase.com/blog/pascal-case-guide): PascalCase rules for classes, React components, C# methods, and TypeScript types.
- [Sentence Case Rules — When to Capitalize Only the First Word](https://flipmycase.com/blog/sentence-case-rules-guide): Sentence case rules, UI guidelines, and comparison with title case.
- [CONSTANT_CASE (Screaming Snake Case) — All-Caps Underscored Names](https://flipmycase.com/blog/constant-case-screaming-snake-case-guide): When to use CONSTANT_CASE for constants, environment variables, and enums.
- [Naming Conventions in Programming — The Complete Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/naming-conventions-programming-guide): camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, PascalCase, CONSTANT_CASE — which languages use which.
- [How to Convert Text Case in JavaScript and Python](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-case-javascript-python-guide): Built-in methods, custom functions, and edge cases for case conversion in code.
- [Text Formatting for Social Media — Bold, Italic, and Special Characters](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-formatting-social-media-guide): Unicode text formatting for Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, and more.
- [How Unicode Text Styles Work — Bold, Italic, Strikethrough, and Beyond](https://flipmycase.com/blog/unicode-text-styles-guide): Mathematical Alphanumeric Symbols, combining characters, and limitations.
- [Text Formatting for Copywriters — Capitalization and Readability](https://flipmycase.com/blog/copywriting-text-formatting-guide): How case style affects CTR, brand perception, and email deliverability.
- [Regex for Text Manipulation — Essential Patterns for Developers](https://flipmycase.com/blog/regex-for-text-manipulation-guide): Email extraction, case conversion, whitespace cleanup, and date reformatting patterns.
